HERO.TITLE: The Quiet Luxury of Time
HERO.SUBTITLE: A minimalist, aesthetic canvas for your screen. Suspended in space, Aura serves as a silent horological companion, enriching your desk setup with dynamic liquid glass, gold, and obsidian atmospheres.
HERO.SEO_KEYWORDS: Aesthetic Screen Clock • Minimalist Desk Clock • Glassmorphism Focus Tool • Premium Pomodoro Background

FEATURES.TITLE: Form & Silence
FEATURES.SUBTITLE: Designed not to scream for attention, but to complete the room. Aura is a digital sculpture tailored for modern curation.
FEATURES.CARD_THEMES_DESC: Immerse your space in emerald cashmeres, gold glimmers, and liquid glass. Transitions are butter-smooth and light on resources.
FEATURES.CARD_FLEX_DESC: Configure your dial. Position the time in any corner, tilt it up to 45 degrees, select bespoke typography, and alter scales.
FEATURES.CARD_FOCUS_DESC: Engage a silent Pomodoro focus cycle or drift into synthesized soundscapes—luxury clockwork ticks and rain patterns.
FEATURES.CARD_SEO_DESC: No database overhead. Your preferences are preserved locally and instantly. Fast load speeds ensure an unblemished experience.

THEMES_SHOWCASE.TITLE: The Curated Collections
THEMES_SHOWCASE.SUBTITLE: Selected horological aesthetics evoking the texture of marble, precious metals, and hand-blown glass.
THEMES_SHOWCASE.LIQUID_GLASS_DESC: Amorphous fluid contours flowing behind heavy frosted glass layers.
THEMES_SHOWCASE.EMERALD_GOLD_DESC: Deep imperial emerald textures detailed with polished gold strokes.
THEMES_SHOWCASE.OBSIDIAN_PLATINUM_DESC: Deep piano black surfaces beneath cold, mirror-polished platinum light.
THEMES_SHOWCASE.FROSTED_GLASS_DESC: Warm ivory tones under a refined champagne gold light.

CTA.TITLE: Redefine Your Screen Aura
CTA.SUBTITLE: A clean, quiet, and beautiful ticking companion for your workspace. No advertisements, no clutter.

CLOCK.SUPPORT_DESC: Help maintain Aura's server status and future design iterations.
